name: Carolina Courts
description: Carolina Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Indian Trail, NC. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Dickerson Community Center Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Dickerson Community Center Tennis/Pickleball Courts in Monroe, NC! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Hunter Oaks
description: Hunter Oaks is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waxhaw, NC. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Hunter Oaks Clubhouse
description: Hunter Oaks Clubhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waxhaw, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Stallings Municipal Park
description: COURTS OPEN DAWN - DUSK. No paid teaching or service of any kind is permissible except by permission of the Parks and Recreation Staff. A maximum of six balls used on any court. Closed when surface is wet or frozen.

name: Stonebridge Golf Community
description: Come play pickleball at Stonebridge Golf Community in Monroe, NC! There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Weddington Swim & Racquet
description: Weddington Swim & Racquet is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Weddington, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Winchester Center
description:
Winchester Community Center Gymnasium is reserved for ages 50+ every Tuesday and Thursday morning. There is a small fee.
It can be rented for $200.00 per hour when not in use by other City of Monroe programs.
fees: Members only — Must be over 50 years old
